name: Meadowmeer Golf & Country Club & Meadowmeer Grill
address: 11640 Meadowmeer Cir NE, Bainbridge Island, WA 98110
about: Meadowmeer Golf & Country Club is a 9-hole semi-private golf course located on Bainbridge Island, playable as an 18-hole course using different tee boxes. The facility features an Indoor Golf Center, completed in 2022, equipped with Trackman technology. It also houses the Meadowmeer Bar & Grill, which serves American fare and cocktails and is open to both members and the public. The venue offers a mix of outdoor golf, year-round indoor simulation, dining, and event space, providing a comprehensive golf and social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round practice and play with state-of-the-art Trackman technology
Scenic Pacific Northwest setting surrounded by old growth forest
Dining options available for both members and the public

food_and_drink.notes: American fare available at the Meadowmeer Bar & Grill
Robust cocktail menu available at the Meadowmeer Bar & Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Four hitting bays equipped with Trackman technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site restaurant and bar, the Meadowmeer Bar & Grill, which serves food and cocktails, so outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time it takes to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers a Junior Golf Camp program and is described as 'A Place for Everyone to Golf,' indicating it is family-friendly.
